title: Cloud First Policy – NZ Government
description: Mandates that New Zealand government organisations must adopt public cloud services for information systems where possible, with requirements for data classification, multi-cloud resilience, cost optimisation, and risk assessment. Establishes baseline standards for cloud procurement and governance across the NZ public sector.
